title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXVIII. Natural History.
content:
Little Robin Red-breast,
            Sat upon a hirdle;
        With a pair of speckled legs,
            And a green girdle.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXVIII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
